reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención al turista, una cuadra y media de cola para atender y te avisan a los gritos y de mala manera, cómo si uno conociera las normas del lugar. El problema debe ser endémico porque hay un cartel para formar fila, pero si hay autos haciendo cola NO SE PUEDE VER. Dos dársenas cerradas, tres plateros charlando entre ellos. En fin, se abusan del monopolio en el lugar.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service for tourists. A line a block and a half long to get served, and they tell you what's next, shouting and rudely, as if you knew the rules of the place. The problem must be widespread because there's a sign to form a line, but if cars are already lined up, you can't see it. Two bays are closed, and three silversmiths are chatting amongst themselves. In short, they're abusing their monopoly in the area.

reviewReply.comment: Lamentamos que hayas tenido esta experiencia Esteban, nos esforzamos por mejorar el servicio. Saludos

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCX2ViZk53EAE
